title: tarenna pilosa var. pilosa
intro: Tarenna pilosa var. pilosa, also known as the hairy Tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation, kill bacteria, and promote digestion. Traditionally, hairy Tarenna is prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with modern medications.
